service.name: Mixpanel API
service.description_for_ai: Product analytics platform. Track user events, funnels, retention, cohorts. Understand user behavior in mobile and web apps. Used by Yelp, DocuSign, Expedia. Use for product analytics, funnel analysis, user retention tracking.

auth.note: Project token for tracking, secret for data export

capabilities.description_for_ai: Track a user event in Mixpanel with properties. Use for product analytics, funnel tracking.

data.description: Base64-encoded JSON array of events: [{event: 'Purchase', properties: {distinct_id: 'user123', token: 'TOKEN', amount: 99.99, plan: 'pro', time: 1234567890}}]

capabilities.description_for_ai: Import historical events in bulk. Use for data migration or batch ingestion.

data.description: [{event: 'Sign Up', properties: {distinct_id, token, time}}] — up to 2000 events per request

strict.description: 1 to reject invalid events, 0 to skip them

capabilities.description_for_ai: Query event data using JQL (JavaScript Query Language). Powerful custom analytics queries.

script.description: JQL script: 'function main() { return Events({from_date: "2024-01-01", to_date: "2024-01-31", event_selectors: [{event: "Purchase"}]}).groupBy(["properties.plan"], mixpanel.reducer.count()); }'

capabilities.description_for_ai: Create or update a user profile with properties for segmentation.
